title: EDUrocks-style UI redesign with neon blue theme + Music and Live TV sections

requirements.text: Redesign the entire site UI to match the EDUrocks layout shown in the uploaded screenshots: a dark maroon/near-black background (approximately #1a0a1a or #0f0a14), a 2-column responsive card grid as the primary homepage layout, each section card featuring a large rounded-square icon badge, a bold section title, and a short description beneath it. Replace all current neon green/cyan accents with neon blue (#00bfff / electric blue) for icon badge backgrounds, card hover borders, text highlights, buttons, and glow effects. Apply this redesign consistently across Navigation, HeroSection, all section cards, and Footer.

quotes: Add everything you saw in the pictures please make the colour's but make the color neon blue
Full UI redesign to match the EDUrocks 2-column card grid layout with dark maroon/near-black background

acceptanceCriteria: Background color is a dark maroon/near-black tone matching the EDUrocks screenshots
All accent colors (icon badges, borders, glow, buttons, active nav links) use neon blue (#00bfff or equivalent)
Homepage displays a 2-column grid of large section cards, each with a rounded-square icon badge, title, and description
Card layout is responsive: single column on mobile, 2-column on tablet/desktop
Navigation, HeroSection, and Footer all use the neon blue accent color
No remnants of neon green or cyan accent colors remain

requirements.text: Update the homepage section card grid to include all 7 sections visible across the uploaded EDUrocks screenshots — Games, Proxy, Movies & TV, Music, Apps, Hacks, and Live TV — each represented as a large 2-column card with a neon blue rounded-square icon (emoji fallback acceptable), a bold title, and a short descriptive subtitle. Clicking a card should smooth-scroll to the corresponding section on the page.

quotes: Add everything you saw in the pictures please
Update navigation to include all 7 sections: Games, Proxy, Movies & TV, Apps, Hacks, Music, Live TV

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage card grid shows exactly 7 section cards: Games, Proxy, Movies & TV, Music, Apps, Hacks, Live TV
Each card has a neon blue rounded-square icon badge, bold title, and short subtitle description
Clicking any card smooth-scrolls to the matching section anchor
Cards are arranged in a 2-column grid matching the EDUrocks layout

requirements.text: Add a new Music section to the page (anchor id='music'). Display a grid of embedded music/radio player cards featuring at least 6 publicly accessible music or internet radio stream embeds (e.g., Lofi Girl YouTube live stream, SomaFM, RadioGarden, NTS Radio, BBC Radio 1, KEXP). Each card shows a neon blue styled icon badge, station/stream name, a short description, and a Play/Listen button that loads the embed in an iframe overlay or inline player. Style the section header with neon blue glow text matching the new EDUrocks-inspired theme.

quotes: Add Music section — embedded music/radio player cards
Stream the library or jump into live radio stations

acceptanceCriteria: A Music section exists on the page with anchor id='music'
At least 6 music/radio stream cards are displayed in a responsive grid
Each card shows a neon blue icon badge, stream name, short description, and a Listen/Play button
Clicking the button loads the stream embed in an iframe overlay or inline player
Section header uses neon blue glow styling matching the site theme

requirements.text: Add a new Live TV section to the page (anchor id='livetv'). Display a grid of at least 6 publicly accessible live TV channel embeds (e.g., NASA TV, ABC News Live, CBS News, Bloomberg TV, DW News, France 24 — all of which offer free public YouTube live embeds or direct iframe embeds). Each card shows a neon blue icon badge, channel name, short description, and a Watch Live button that loads the channel embed in an iframe overlay. Style the section header with neon blue glow text.

quotes: Add Live TV section — publicly available live TV channel embeds
Stream publicly available live TV channels through our player

acceptanceCriteria: A Live TV section exists on the page with anchor id='livetv'
At least 6 live TV channel cards are displayed in a responsive grid
Each card shows a neon blue icon badge, channel name, short description, and a Watch Live button
Clicking the button loads the live channel embed in an iframe overlay
Section header uses neon blue glow styling matching the site theme

requirements.text: Update the Navigation bar to include links to all 7 sections in this order: Games, Proxy, Movies & TV, Music, Apps, Hacks, Live TV. Update the HeroSection CTA buttons and/or the homepage section card grid to link to all 7 sections. Ensure the mobile hamburger menu also lists all 7 links and active section highlighting uses neon blue for the selected link.

quotes: Update navigation to include all 7 sections in the new style

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar shows links to: Games, Proxy, Movies & TV, Music, Apps, Hacks, Live TV
Mobile hamburger menu includes all 7 navigation links
Active section link is highlighted with neon blue accent
HeroSection or homepage card grid provides access to all 7 sections

constraints: Do not remove or break any existing sections: Games, Proxy, Movies & TV (ShowsSection), Apps, Hacks
Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths)
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui/ (immutable paths)
Retain existing GamePlayer modal for in-page game playback
Retain existing VideoPlayer modal for show/movie trailer playback
All iframe embeds must use publicly accessible URLs — no paid or authenticated sources
nonGoals: Changing the site name away from zakariasadeq7site123
Adding a Live Chat section (shown in screenshots but not requested)
Adding an AI assistant section (shown in screenshots but not requested)
Backend schema changes for Music or Live TV (hardcoded frontend data is sufficient)
Real-time WebSocket or push notification features
User authentication beyond existing Internet Identity setup
